name: Toraason neuronal reprogramming-factor ortholog cognition study
summary: C. elegans study using doxycycline-inducible neuron-specific expression of OSK-factor orthologs to test short-term associative memory, lifespan, and chemotaxis behavior during aging.
model_system: Aging C. elegans with neuron-specific inducible expression of OSK-factor orthologs
